subcodes.first_line: The mention of the All-Merciful hath been raised from the divine Lote-Tree of man in this Ridván, which standeth at the pole of existence [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد ارتفع ذکر الرحمن من سدره الانسان فی هذا الرضوان الذی کان فی قطب الاکوان
subcodes.subjects: @chastisement and requital, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @murder; causing physical harm, @two kinds of knowledge [ilm and irfan]; sight and insight, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
